title: Team thinking, visualized by Claude
summary: Anthropic's Claude was used by Atlassian and the Williams F1 Team to visualize the cognitive patterns of drivers and team members during races. Biometric readings were processed by Claude to generate visual outputs that appeared on helmets, race suits, and garage displays during the Monaco race debut.
